Home / Services / Patio Pavers

Patio Pavers

Custom outdoor living spaces for Colorado lifestyles.

From Wash Park bungalows to RiNo loft complexes, we build paver patios that handle Denver's extremes. Our base layers include 8 inches of compacted gravel with polymeric sand joints that resist weed growth and freeze damage.

We source locally from Rocky Mountain Stone to reduce transportation costs, offering tumbled pavers that mimic Red Rocks' hues for natural aesthetics. For Victorian homes, we replicate historic brick patterns. Modern designs get geometric layouts with integrated drainage channels to handle summer cloudbursts. All installations include a 2% slope away from structures to prevent foundation water damage.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Excavation with proper slope calculations
  2. 02 Step 2: Geotextile fabric and gravel base installation
  3. 03 Step 3: Precision paver cutting and placement
  4. 04 Step 4: Joint sand activation and sealing

Benefits

  • Interlocking design handles ground movement
  • Permeable options meet Denver Water requirements
  • No hot-surface issues like concrete in summer
  • Individual paver replacement capability

Frequently Asked Questions

Can pavers handle Denver's hail?

Yes—our tumbled concrete pavers have compressive strengths over 8,000 psi. We've installed them at Red Rocks-area homes with zero hail damage reports.

How do you prevent frost heave?

Our deeper base layers include crushed granite that drains better than typical road base, critical for Littleton's clay-heavy soils.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with patio pavers? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-con-r90
